heroBody: A data-driven decision support platform built for geotechnical companies. Select the right machine based on soil data, foresee risks, and optimize operation costs.
heroFootnote: For geotechnical companies · Calculations based on SPT, RQD and UCS data
positioningDesc: Decisions based on spreadsheets and personal experience cannot be transferred, documented, or standardized. GeoDrill translates drilling engineering knowledge into the system.
ctaDesc: Let's explore together how you can digitize your geotechnical analyses. Fill in the form for a demo.
ctaFootnote: Calculations based on SPT, RQD and UCS data · For geotechnical companies

f1Desc: Layer-by-layer soil characterization with SPT, UCS and RQD values. Stability risk and casing need calculated automatically.
f2Desc: Minimum required torque calculation based on the Meyerhof formula. Automatic adjustment by soil type and rock quality.
f3Desc: Suitability assessment for all equipment in your fleet. Comparative decision on a single screen.
f4Desc: Required casing pipe length based on groundwater level and stability risk. Reasoned evaluation.
f5Desc: Total drilling duration and fuel consumption estimate. Daily production target and Gantt chart.
f6Desc: Corporate-quality report output with project summary, technical analysis and executive summary.
how1Desc: Enter SPT, UCS, RQD values layer by layer. Stability risk and casing need computed instantly.
how2Desc: Record your drilling rigs with torque, depth and diameter capacities.
how3Desc: Torque, casing, fuel and duration calculated automatically. System recommends the best machine.
how4Desc: Equipment decision, technical outputs and operation recommendations on one screen.
how5Desc: Fuel, depreciation, labor and consumable costs calculated. Total price including profit margin.
pos1Text: Formula-based calculation eliminates dependence on personal judgment
pos2Text: Every decision is saved as PDF with its rationale
pos3Text: Different engineers work with the same methodology
pos4Text: Manual calculation time drops from hours to minutes
discoverItem1Desc: Our mission, methodology and vision for digitalizing geotechnical engineering.

discoverItem4Desc: Request a demo or reach us for technical questions.
aboutSubtitle: GeoDrill Insight was built to make drilling decisions by geotechnical companies data-driven, standardized and documentable.
storyP1: As field engineers, we noticed we were repeating the same calculations before every project. Different engineers reaching different decisions for the same soil, Excel spreadsheets getting lost, reports that couldn't be standardized...
storyP2: To solve these problems, we started developing GeoDrill Insight in 2023. Our goal was simple: after a geotechnical engineer enters soil data, they get all their technical decisions — torque, casing, equipment selection, duration and cost — reliably and with justification within 5 minutes.
storyP3: Today the platform is based on FHWA GEC 10, EN 1536:2010 and Eurocode 7 standards. Every calculation is reflected in the PDF report with its rationale.
val1Desc: Every engineer works with the same methodology on every project. Personal interpretation differences are eliminated.
val2Desc: Every decision is automatically reflected in the PDF report with its rationale.
val3Desc: Manual calculation times drop from hours to 3–5 minutes. Field decisions can be made instantly.
val4Desc: Calculation engine based on FHWA, EN 1536 and Eurocode 7 standards.
aboutCtaDesc: Create a demo request, our team will respond within 24 hours.
blogSubtitle: In-depth articles on field experiences, geotechnical methodology and calculation engine design.
faqSubtitle: Answers about the platform, calculation engine, and usage.
faq1Q: Which soil types does GeoDrill support?
faq1A: Fill, Clay, Silt, Sand, Gravel, Weathered Rock, Sandstone, Limestone, and Hard Rock — 9 soil types total. Separate stability, ROP and torque coefficients are applied for each type.
faq2A: The calculation engine is based on FHWA GEC 10, EN 1536:2010 and Eurocode 7 standards. ROP estimates have been calibrated with field data from the Thrace, Marmara and Central Anatolia regions. When SPT, UCS and CPT are entered, calculation confidence reaches the 'High' band.
faq3Q: Can multiple users use the system?
faq3A: Yes. Each user logs in with their own account; projects and equipment fleet are kept separate per person. Companies can start with a demo account request and scale as needed.
faq4Q: Are PDF reports suitable for corporate presentations?
faq4A: Yes. Reports include project summary, technical analysis tables, equipment suitability matrix and calculation rationale. Customization for corporate needs is planned.
faq5Q: What happens if groundwater data is not entered?
faq5A: The system stays on the safe side: water presence is not assumed in non-cohesive layers, but the calculation confidence score drops by 10 points and a 'conditional' evaluation is made in the casing decision. Entering field measurements always produces more accurate results.
faq6Q: Does it work on mobile devices?
faq6A: Yes, it works on all modern browsers and mobile devices. Data entry can be done from a tablet or phone in field conditions.
faqCtaTitle: Couldn't find what you're looking for?
